# Let's implement the described logic.
from pathlib import Path

# Try to read the file from the given path
paths = [
    "/mnt/data/file-9ywwx6iVTag4Tnq1S7R2Ah-text_to_analyse.txt",
    "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt",
    "text_to_analyse.txt"
]
text = None
for p in paths:
    try:
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            text = f.read()
        print("Read from", p, "len", len(text))
        break
    except FileNotFoundError:
        continue

text is None

text_path = "/mnt/data/file-9ywwx6iVTag4Tnq1S7R2Ah-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text_raw = f.read()

spans = []
start_search = 0
while True:
    left_brace = text_raw.find("{", start_search)
    if left_brace == -1:
        break
    right_brace = text_raw.find("}", left_brace+1)
    if right_brace == -1:
        break
    inner = text_raw[left_brace+1:right_brace]
    # Check if inner contains ayah/hadith cues
    if "وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ" in inner:
        span_candidate = inner.strip()
        # Compute start index by locating first occurrence of span_candidate in raw
        start_pos = text_raw.find(span_candidate, left_brace+1, right_brace)
        end_pos = start_pos + len(span_candidate)
        spans.append({"span_start": start_pos, "span_end": end_pos, "span_text": span_candidate, "citation_type": "Aya"})
    # Move to next brace
    start_search = right_brace + 1

spans

# Let's print all block contents
text_raw = text_raw  # alias
positions = []
start_search = 0
idx = 0
while True:
    left_brace = text_raw.find("{", start_search)
    if left_brace == -1:
        break
    right_brace = text_raw.find("}", left_brace+1)
    if right_brace == -1:
        break
    inner = text_raw[left_brace+1:right_brace]
    positions.append((left_brace, right_brace, inner))
    start_search = right_brace + 1

for i,(l,r,inner) in enumerate(positions):
    print(i, l, r, "contains cue?", "وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ" in inner)

span_text = "وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ * لَّأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ صُدُورَ أَصْدِقَاءَكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَأَخَذَتْهُمْ فِي الْعَذَابِ مَفْزَزَةً * أَوْ لَمْ يَكُونُوا مُؤْمِنِينَ"
len(span_text)
